entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary cereal crop grown in Northern Namibia.

entities.name: NORTHERN NAMIBIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the diagnostic study was conducted.

entities.name: SHORT DURATION
entities.description: A trait of pearl millet preferred by farmers over grain yield.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A major environmental constraint affecting pearl millet production.

entities.name: DRAFT POWER
entities.description: The availability of animal power for farming operations, identified as a constraint.

entities.name: CROP SEED
entities.description: High-quality seeds used for planting.

entities.name: EARLY THINNING
entities.description: The practice of removing excess seedlings early in the growth cycle.

entities.name: WEEDING
entities.description: The process of removing unwanted plants from the crop field.

entities.name: MANURE
entities.description: Organic fertilizer used by farmers to improve soil.

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: Synthetic nutrients applied to the soil, used limitedly.

entities.name: DROUGHT MITIGATING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies developed to reduce the impact of drought.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET CULTIVARS
entities.description: Specific varieties of pearl millet developed to meet farmer preferences.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth.

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Methods used to optimize crop growth and yield.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between actual on-farm yields and potential on-station yields.

entities.name: IMPROVED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Enhanced farming practices to increase yield.

entities.name: VARIETAL CHANGE
entities.description: The replacement of existing cultivars with improved ones.

entities.name: RESOURCE MANAGEMENT RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on optimizing the use of farming resources.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving crop traits through breeding.

entities.name: ON-FARM RESEARCH
entities.description: Research conducted directly in farmers' fields.
